amendment.description: An amendment numbered 8 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to add hot rotisserie chicken as an eligible item to be purchased by SNAP benefits.
amendment.purpose: Amendment adds hot rotisserie chicken as an eligible item to be purchased by SNAP benefits.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Crawford amendment (A008) Agreed to by recorded vote: 384 - 35 (Roll no. 145).

action.text: Roll call votes on amendments in House
House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Crawford amendment (A008) Agreed to by recorded vote: 384 - 35 (Roll no. 145).
